name: dsers-mcp-server
description: Official DSers MCP for dropshipping: import, edit, price, and publish products to Shopify and Wix
long_description: An MCP server that lets AI agents automate the DSers dropshipping workflow. Paste a product link from AliExpress, Alibaba, 1688, or Accio.com — your AI agent imports it, applies pricing rules, cleans up the title, and pushes it to a connected Shopify or Wix store. Supports bulk import, multi-store push, SEO optimization, and pre-push safety checks.

tools.name: dsers_store_discover
tools.description: Retrieve Shopify or Wix stores, shipping methods, pricing rules, and push options

tools.name: dsers_rules_validate
tools.description: Test pricing or title rules before applying — catches mistakes early

tools.name: dsers_product_import
tools.description: Import a product from AliExpress, Alibaba, 1688, or Accio URL with optional pricing rules

tools.name: dsers_product_preview
tools.description: Review an imported product — title, price, variants, stock at a glance

tools.name: dsers_product_update_rules
tools.description: Update pricing, content, images, or variant rules on an already-imported product (incremental merge)

tools.name: dsers_store_push
tools.description: Push products to Shopify or Wix — single, bulk, or all stores at once

tools.name: dsers_product_delete
tools.description: Delete a product from the DSers import list (irreversible, requires confirmation)

tools.name: dsers_find_product
tools.description: Search the DSers product pool by keyword or image — results link directly to import

tools.name: dsers_import_list
tools.description: Browse your import staging list with cost, sell price, stock, and markup status

tools.name: dsers_my_products
tools.description: See products already pushed to a store, with supplier links for re-import

tools.name: dsers_alt_supplier_list
tools.description: List primary and alternate suppliers mapped to a DSers product, including supplier URLs and variant detail when requested

tools.name: dsers_inventory_policy_get
tools.description: Read the DSers account inventory sync policy for supplier out-of-stock and delisted-product behavior

tools.name: dsers_sku_remap
tools.description: SKU-level supplier replacement for an already-pushed store product. Strict mode: provide new_supplier_url for an exact swap. Discover mode: omit it and the tool reverse-image-searches the DSers pool and auto-picks the best replacement via multi-factor ranking. Always preview before apply.

prompts.name: dsers_workflow_quick-import
prompts.description: Import a single product and push to store as draft

prompts.name: dsers_workflow_bulk-import
prompts.description: Batch import multiple products with pricing multiplier

prompts.name: dsers_workflow_multi-push
prompts.description: Push one product to all Shopify or Wix stores

prompts.name: dsers_workflow_seo-optimize
prompts.description: Import, AI-rewrite title & description for SEO, then push
